PRETRIAL MOTION, DEPT. 212, RENOTICE OF PETITION TO VACATE SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF MARIE BODGETT'S RENOTICE OF PETITION TO VACATE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 10/4/04 TO RUSSELL DAVID, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE AND NO OBJECTION, THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT DEFE'S MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: YVONNE LEE # 5616 (212)

Renotice Of Petition To Vacate Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Marie Bodgett's renotice of petition to vacate sanctions issued on 10/4/04 to Russell David, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance and no objection, the court's tentative ruling to grant defe's motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Yvonne Lee # 5616 (212)
